title: How does Claude Code *actually* work?
body_text: If I've learned anything from running this channel, it's that you guys really, really love vague terms that don't actually mean anything, like agentic coding or vibe coding or all these other things. And while I feel like I finally understand what an agent is, we have yet another new term we have to wrangle, harness. And I've been talking about harnesses a lot more.
